name: Candy Bar Cookies on a Stick
recipeIngredient: 40 Snickers candy bars (or Mars bars, miniature size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat peanut butter, margarine (or butter), and shortening in a large mixing bowl on high speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add granulated sugar, brown sugar, and baking soda; beat until combined.
3. Beat in eggs and vanilla until combined.
4. Beat in as much flour as you can with the mixer on medium, scraping sides of the bowl occasionally.
5. Stir in any remaining flour with a spoon.
6. Insert a wooden stick into each candy bar piece.
7. Form about 2 tablespoons of dough into a ball shape around each candy bar piece, making sure the candy is completely covered.
8. If desired, roll the ball in decorative candies, nuts, or colored sugar, gently pushing candies or nuts into the dough.
9. Place cookies 2-1/2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Bake at 325°F for 15-20 minutes or until golden and set. Cool on the cookie sheet for 5 minutes before removing to a wire rack to cool completely.
11. If desired, drizzle or frost the cookies with melted chocolate or frosting.
